mainEntity.name: What defenses do employers use against respiratory claims in South Salt Lake?
mainEntity.text: What defenses do employers use against respiratory claims in South Salt Lake?

acceptedAnswer.text: Common defenses: pre-existing condition, PPE provided, exposure below OSHA PEL, alternative causes like smoking or inversion pollution.

suggestedAnswer.text: South Salt Lake factories cite respirator programs (per [1]). Rebut with fit-test failures, non-compliance logs. Medical panels resolve 60% disputes. Preserve現場 evidence.

name: Employer Defenses in South Salt Lake Respiratory Claims
description: Common defenses: pre-existing condition, PPE provided, exposure below OSHA PEL, alternative causes like smoking or inversion pollution.
